spoken_input: 150g grilled chicken with rice and broccoli.
A burger with fries and a coke.
Avocado toast with a soft-boiled egg and a cappuccino with soy milk.
A bowl of ramen with pork belly and a soft egg.
Some pad thai, not sure how much, and a green tea.
Had a big shawarma wrap and some hummus on the side, also a sparkling water.
I think I had a chicken curry, maybe two portions, with naan and a mango lassi.
Two slices of pepperoni pizza, a tiramisu, and a diet coke.
Had the usual at the Thai place, green curry I think, with rice, maybe a spring roll too, and we shared a dessert, the mango sticky rice.
Not totally sure what was in it but I had that grain bowl from the place near work, had some kind of sauce, quinoa maybe or farro, roasted veggies, and I think a poached egg on top.
We went to that Korean BBQ place, had some pork belly, beef bulgogi, a bunch of banchan sides, steamed rice, finished with a soju and a beer.
